arts.ttl: I met Liverpool legend in his apartment - Aston Villa and Tottenham wanted me but I couldn’t say no
arts.sum: Charlie Adam has opened up about holding transfer talks with former Liverpool manager Gerard Houllier and why he didn't have to think twice about joining the Reds

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Liverpool: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Aston Villa take on Liverpool in the Premier League on Wednesday. Preview includes team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: How to watch Aston Villa vs Liverpool: TV channel, live stream, kick off time
arts.sum: Liverpool travel to Villa Park in a clash with hefty title ramifications on Wednesday, and many football fans in the UK will be keen to watch Arne Slot’s side showdown with Aston Villa live on TV

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: 'Unacceptable' star slammed in furious rant as Arne Slot dismisses title claim
arts.sum: Liverpool have a quick turnaround after their 2-1 win over Wolves as they prepare for a trip to Aston Villa on Wednesday night, with Arne Slot's side knowing they can go ten points clear at the top with a win

arts.ttl: Arne Slot explains controversial Liverpool team selection - 'That's why I didn't play them'
arts.sum: Arne Slot believes his decision to rest players in the FA Cup can now prove of benefit for Liverpool in the Premier League

arts.ttl: 'People are trying' - Arne Slot makes 'pressure' point as Liverpool target emerges
arts.sum: Arne Slot has issued a reality check on Liverpool title hopes ahead of Premier League trip to Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Liverpool contract latest: Luis Diaz sends message to Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk, Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Luis Diaz addresses the potential departures of Virgil van Dijk, Mohamed Salah and Trent Alexander-Arnold amidst speculation they will leave the club in the summer.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot insists Liverpool CANNOT play 'fantastic football' every week amid recent wobble - as Reds look to go 10 points clear at the top
arts.sum: JOE BERNSTEIN: Slot's Premier League leaders could move 10 points clear with a win at Villa Park but have been unconvincing in their last three games.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery tells Marcus Rashford how he can become Aston Villa's Mo Salah
arts.sum: Aston Villa’s boss was gushing with praise for the Mo Salah, who he says is ‘unique’ as he prepared for a test he says is the most difficult his club will face during the run-in

arts.ttl: Arne Slot admits Liverpool are just two games from home straight of Arsenal title race
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Aston Villa on Wednesday night before a trip to Manchester City on Sunday in what could be a huge few days in their bid for a 20th English league title
